summary: First-pass full E2E testing of Roofing CRM. Backend: 20/20 pytest tests passed (auth, options, contacts/properties/deals CRUD, dashboard aggregations). Frontend: All critical flows passed - login, dashboard KPIs, sidebar navigation, contact creation with billing-same-as-address toggle, property creation with linked-contact dropdown, deal creation with all 5 dropdowns from /api/options, deal detail page (Revenue/Costs/Profit KPIs), and logout redirect. No blocking issues found.

minor.issue: Failed login does not implement brute-force lockout (5 attempts). Not requested in PRD but standard auth hardening recommendation.

JWT is only returned in body (Bearer in localStorage). No httpOnly cookie set on login. get_current_user reads cookie if present, but /api/auth/login never sets one. Acceptable per PRD ('JWT in Authorization header') but deviates from playbook httpOnly-cookie pattern.

issues: After successful login, app navigates to '/' (which renders Dashboard) instead of '/dashboard'. Functionally fine but inconsistent with test expectation of '/dashboard' URL.

action_items: (Optional) Consider redirecting to '/dashboard' after login for URL consistency.
(Optional) Add brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login if security hardening is desired.
(Optional) On contacts page, the billing_address input is hidden when billing_same_as_address=true; this is good UX but verify edit flow correctly re-populates if toggled back off after save.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 452-line file - acceptable for current scope but would benefit from splitting into routers (auth/contacts/properties/deals/dashboard) if it grows past 700 lines.
Dashboard profit_ytd uses string comparison of ISO timestamps against year_start - works correctly because ISO-8601 is lexicographically sortable, but a typed datetime comparison would be safer.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True - this combination is rejected by browsers per spec. Production deploys must set explicit CORS_ORIGINS.
No rate limiting on /api/auth/login or /api/auth/register. Low risk for MVP.
register/login does not return refresh tokens; 24h access token expiry is reasonable for MVP.
All endpoints correctly strip Mongo _id (find with projection or strip_id helper). No ObjectId leakage observed.
seed_data_creation: Admin user is auto-seeded on backend startup if not present. Test created/cleaned TEST_-prefixed contact, property, deal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at /app/backend/server.py - single-file FastAPI with Mongo, JWT (HS256) auth via Authorization: Bearer header (also accepts cookie 'access_token' but login does not set one). Frontend stores token in localStorage 'crm_token'. Login redirects to '/' (Dashboard renders there). All data-testid selectors documented in review request work as specified. /api/options is auth-protected and returns lead_sources(7)/project_types(5)/roof_types(8)/deal_statuses(4). Dashboard /api/dashboard/summary computes pipeline_revenue from non-Won/Lost deals' chosen_amount, won_revenue from Won deals, total_costs from Won deals only, profit_ytd from Won deals created in current year. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py uses pytest classes - rerun with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml
rca of the issue: No bugs found - implementation matches PRD.
